---
title: FIMS R Packages
listing:
  id: fims-packages
  contents:
    - fims-packages.yaml
  sort:
    - "weight"
    - "title"
  type: grid
  image-height: 250px
  grid-columns: 3
  fields: [image, title, description, categories]
header-includes: >
  <link rel="stylesheet" href="../assets/packages.css">
---

::: {#fims-packages-listing}
::: {.quarto-listing-container}
:::
:::
